name: Passport Revocation Avoidance via Collection Alternatives

eligibility.description: Available to individuals with assessed tax debt exceeding $50,000 (inflation-adjusted to $62,000 for 2024) who are facing passport sanctions. Debt must be handled via IRC 6159, 7122, or 6015.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can prevent or reverse the certification of 'seriously delinquent tax debt' (which triggers passport denial or revocation) by entering into an installment agreement, an offer-in-compromise, or requesting innocent spouse relief.
